• PSSH box tools
  • PSSH box generator

  PSSH box generator  

Given a Key ID and other optional arguments, this tool generates a Widevine PSSH box and encodes it in Base 64 format.

Mandatory field

Optional fields

All fields below can be left blank or at their default values.

PSSH box version:
v0 PSSH boxes are more widely supported by Widevine license servers

Encryption algorithm (optional)

Protection scheme

Privacy: this tool is implemented in WebAssembly (WASM) and runs fully inside your web browser (there is no server backend).

Built on 2026-05-09 with pssh-box version  GitHub repository WebAssembly made with Rust
